text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka and I are visiting a shrine
together...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hrmmm! I sense an aura of bad luck coming from
you, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: No! Our meeting here is destiny!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was commanded by the heavens to go and pray
that Suzuka's bad luck be cleansed!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, simply do as I do. Now, watch
closely!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Haiya, woiya! Awe-awe aye-aye, hoppity-mag!
May she be blessed with good fortune multiplied
to abundance!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now, now, now! Give it a try, Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: M-me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But of cooourse!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I-I appreciate the offer, but I think I'd prefer to
do it the usual way.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Then, begin! Haiya!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? What?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Haiyaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, h-haiya?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Woiya!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Woiya?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! I feel a positive aura! You should be
much better now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Surely this won't have any real effect...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aha ha ha! ♪ Good things come to those who
believe!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Haiya, woiya...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? I-impossible... I actually feel a lot better!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: What's that? Did you say something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: N-no, it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether it's thanks to the strange prayer or not,
Silence Suzuka is in great form at her next
practice.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Yes, you have been blessed. How do you
feel, Suzuka?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I don't feel any different from normal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Caw, caw! Caw, caw!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Waaah! It's a whole flock of bad luck! Black cats and crows!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wonder if someone’s been feeding them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We can't be sure it's due to bad luck, but Silence
Suzuka's condition remains poor throughout our
next training session.
